plato:3dPrinterBedIsPreheated.rdfs:label: 3dPrinterBedIsPreheated
plato:3dPrinterBedIsPreheated.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets the bed of a 3d printer to be preheated

plato:3dPrinterCanReachNozzleTemperature.rdfs:label: 3dPrinterCanReachNozzleTemperature
plato:3dPrinterCanReachNozzleTemperature.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets a temperature that the nozzle of a 3d printer can reach

plato:3dPrintingWorkpieceIsPrinted.rdfs:label: 3dPrintingWorkpieceIsPrinted
plato:3dPrintingWorkpieceIsPrinted.rdfs:comment: Requires a workpiece to be printed or sets its state to printed

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionHotbedHe.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionHotbedHeated
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionHotbedHe.rdfs:comment: Requires the bed of a 3d printer to be preheated before the printing service can begin

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionHotbedNo.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionHotbedNotHeated
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionHotbedNo.rdfs:comment: Requires the bed of a 3d printer to not be preheated before the printing service can begin

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpiec.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpieceNotPrinted
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpiec.rdfs:comment: Requires the workpiece that shall be printed to not already have been printed

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionCanReach.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionCanReachNozzleTemperature
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionCanReach.rdfs:comment: Requires the 3d printer to be able to reach the desired nozzle temperature

plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpiecePrint.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpiecePrinted
plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpiecePrint.rdfs:comment: States that a workpiece has been printed

plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectHotbedNotHeate.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpieceEffectHotbedNotHeated
plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectHotbedNotHeate.rdfs:comment: Turns off the heated bed after printing a workpiece

plato:PreheatBedPreconditionBedNotPrehea.rdfs:label: PreheatBedPreconditionBedNotPreheated
plato:PreheatBedPreconditionBedNotPrehea.rdfs:comment: Requires the heated bed of a 3d printer to not already be heated

plato:PreheatBedEffectBedIsPreheated.rdfs:label: PreheatBedEffectBedIsPreheated
plato:PreheatBedEffectBedIsPreheated.rdfs:comment: Turns on the heated bed after PreheatBed service has concluded

plato:PrusaMK3001canReachNozzleTemperatu.rdfs:label: PrusaMK3001canReachNozzleTemperature250
plato:PrusaMK3001canReachNozzleTemperatu.rdfs:comment: States that the PrusaMK3001 can reach a nozzle temperature of up to 250 degrees celsius

plato:PrusaMK3002canReachNozzleTemperatu.rdfs:label: PrusaMK3002canReachNozzleTemperature250
plato:PrusaMK3002canReachNozzleTemperatu.rdfs:comment: States that the PrusaMK3002 can reach a nozzle temperature of up to 250 degrees celsius

plato:AnetA8v2canReachNozzleTemperature2.rdfs:label: AnetA8v2canReachNozzleTemperature200
plato:AnetA8v2canReachNozzleTemperature2.rdfs:comment: States that the AnetA8v2 can reach a nozzle temperature of up to 200 degrees celsius
